title: Integration report + explicit limitations statement
context: M3 honest reporting. The limitations statement must warn against reading integration artifacts as biology. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Author the integration report with an explicit limitations statement accompanying the integrated atlas.
acceptanceCriteria: Report documents integration method, params, and tool versions and shows pre-/post-integration results.
Limitations statement explicitly warns against reading integration artifacts as biology.
